{{Infobox group
| name = Shepherd (The Last Horizon)
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A Shepherd is a cyborg mage that functions as an integrated member of the [[Legion]]. These entities possess the ability to exert influence over a local [[Hive]], which can present difficulties for those attempting to manage them through magic. [[Shepherds]] are capable of intervening in conflicts, such as neutralizing security fleets and bringing them under the control of the [[Legion]].}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|As part of the standard crew complement for an [[Iron Legion]] Penetrator, a Shepherd serves as a cyborg mage integrated into the [[Legion]]. These hooded figures possess the ability to generate shimmering shields with a simple wave of their hands and maintain control over the local [[Hive]]. Furthermore, individuals can be transformed into [[Shepherds]] by [[Pawns]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A Shepherd is part of the standard crew complement for an [[Iron Legion]] Penetrator.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Pawns]] can turn people into [[Shepherds]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16">''The Captain'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Shepherds]] are cyborg mages integrated into the [[Legion]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18">''The Captain'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Shepherds]] have control over the local [[Hive]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Shepherd can generate a shimmering shield with a wave of his hand.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Shepherd is a hooded figure with a shield.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
